description:
Operating Area: Greece

JULIA is a 12.80m / 42ft Catamaran Luxury Yacht built in 2023 by Bali Catamarans. Sleeping 10 guests in 6 cabins and with a crew of 2. The guest cabins comprise 4 double cabins and en-suite bathroom facilities.

Embarkation:
On charter start date from 17:00 all the yachts delivered, cleaned, with full tanks of fuel (yacht and dinghy), full tank of water, clean linens.

Disembarkation:
On the charter end date by 09:00 yachts should be re-delivered in the same condition as received with full tanks in fuel and water. Compulsory: return to re delivery base the evening before disembarkation by 18:00.

pricing.note:
* Skipper is obligatory /skipper fee doesn’t include in the price
** 2 single cabins at the 2 front bows have bed & wc

Charter rates in Euro apply to weekly 7 nights/6 days charter period. Αll prices subject to change without notice

All prices in Euro
Prices and Terms are subject to change without prior notice
Ιn case of a typographical error leading to an incorrect price being publiced we reserve the right to correct it

Charter Rates include
• Yacht charter with its equipment
• VAT at a current rate discounted to 12% (subject to conditions)
• First & last night at the marina/port
• autopilot, GPS
• dinghy & outboard engine
• first fill of gasoline
• 1 plus one spare bottles of gas
• bed sheets & bath towels 1 set per person per week

Charter Rates do not include
• Traveler, Trip Cancellation insurance,
• skipper liability insurance,
• personal items insurance
• Extra services and arrangements (transfers to/from the base,
provisioning, water toys equipment,crew fees)
• diesel, fuel and water consumption, port fees during charter
